count_basis: Derived from approximately 510 active components, including buses, lines, transformers, and PV stations.
note: Includes locating component categories and creating corresponding model objects.

count_basis: Estimated from repeated electrical-parameter entries across component types.
note: Includes entry of voltage levels, ratings, impedance-related fields, and generation/load parameters.

count_basis: Estimated from connection operations among buses, lines, transformers, and generation units.
note: Includes topology association and connectivity-related manual operations.

manual_interaction_group: Consistency checking and visual context switching
count_basis: Estimated from repeated diagram/table switching and engineering verification during model preparation.
note: Includes visual checking, selected component verification, and context switching.
This is the conservative lower-bound estimate reported in Section VI.

count_basis: Representative manual activation of the target model and operating scenario.
note: Includes opening or activating the target model and scenario.

count_basis: Manual search for the target component, contingency task, or analysis context in diagrams and tables.
note: Includes visual search and context identification.

count_basis: Manual configuration of contingency-analysis settings and contingency set.
note: Includes selecting or confirming the contingency-analysis setup.

count_basis: Manual execution trigger and report-interface navigation.
note: Includes opening the result interface and navigating to the relevant report.

count_basis: Manual inspection of violation tables and confirmation of reported security state.
note: Includes identifying overloaded elements and checking the engineering meaning of the report.
This is the conservative lower-bound estimate reported in Section VI.
